query:
SELECT u.id as user_id, u.email, u.name, tm.tenantId,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deals WHERE tenantId = tm.tenantId) as deal_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stakeholders WHERE tenantId = tm.tenantId) as stakeholder_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetings WHERE tenantId = tm.tenantId) as meeting_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM snapshots WHERE tenantId = tm.tenantId) as snapshot_count
FROM users u
JOIN tenantMembers tm ON tm.userId = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'leo@meridianos.ai';
